e.g.; CI run failure: https://github.com/lfortran/lfortran/actions/runs/11884738350/job/33113364806.

This is a high-priority issue, as it impacts all the PR's created against *main* and will lead to failure of *Check SciPy Build and Test Run* CI job. 

## Possible problem

Probably some packages changed to build SciPy and it now fails
